title: Financial Aid Applications
description: Detailed information concerning financial aid applications.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the financial aid application.

applicant.title: Applicant
applicant.description: The person associated with the financial aid application.

person.title: Person
person.description: A reference link to the common Persons entity for an applicant who is known to the student information system.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Person.

financialAidApplicant.title: Financial Aid Applicant
financialAidApplicant.description: A reference link to the Financial Aid Applicants entity for an applicant who may not be known to the student information system.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Financial Aid Applicant.

applicationCompletedOn.title: Application Completed On
applicationCompletedOn.description: The date the application was completed.

aidYear.title: Aid Year
aidYear.description: The financial aid year for which the applicant applied.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Aid Year.

methodology.title: Methodology
methodology.description: The methodology for which the application is applicable.

source.title: Source
source.description: The source of the financial aid application.

stateOfLegalResidence.title: State Of Legal Residence
stateOfLegalResidence.description: The applicant's state of legal residence.

independenceCriteria.title: Independence Criteria
independenceCriteria.description: The criteria for determining the applicant's dependency status.

workStudy.title: Work Study
workStudy.description: An indication of the applicant's interest in a work study program.

taxReturn.title: Tax Return
taxReturn.description: The custodial parent(s) tax filing status.

adjustedGrossIncome.title: Adjusted Gross Income
adjustedGrossIncome.description: The custodial parent(s) adjusted gross income.

firstParentEarnedIncome.title: First Parent Earned Income
firstParentEarnedIncome.description: The first custodial parent's earned income.

secondParentEarnedIncome.title: Second Parent Earned Income
secondParentEarnedIncome.description: The second custodial parent's earned income.

firstParentHighestEducationLevel.title: First Parent Highest Education Level
firstParentHighestEducationLevel.description: The first custodial parent's highest education level completed.

secondParentHighestEducationLevel.title: Second Parent Highest Education Level
secondParentHighestEducationLevel.description: The second custodial parent's highest education level completed.

taxReturn.title: Tax Return
taxReturn.description: The noncustodial parent(s) tax filing status.

adjustedGrossIncome.title: Adjusted Gross Income
adjustedGrossIncome.description: The noncustodial parent(s) adjusted gross income.

firstParentEarnedIncome.title: First Parent Earned Income
firstParentEarnedIncome.description: The first noncustodial parent's earned income.

secondParentEarnedIncome.title: Second Parent Earned Income
secondParentEarnedIncome.description: The second noncustodial parent's earned income.

firstParentHighestEducationLevel.title: First Parent Highest Education Level
firstParentHighestEducationLevel.description: The first noncustodial parent's highest education level completed.

secondParentHighestEducationLevel.title: Second Parent Highest Education Level
secondParentHighestEducationLevel.description: The second noncustodial parent's highest education level completed.
